languages.original_text: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

languages.text: "Мон-кай, что пришли благодарить элантах за заботу об их телах, были искренни. Но я не стала бы называть чувство раба, что ласкается к руке своего хозяина ради куска еды, красивым".

"The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."
languages.original_text: "Мон-кай, что пришли благодарить элантах за заботу об их телах, были искренни. Но я не стала бы называть чувство раба, что ласкается к руке своего хозяина ради куска еды, красивым".

traits.locale_text: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

"The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

"The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

languages.text: 「自分の身体を気遣ってくれたエランタに感謝に来たモンケィは誠実だった。しかし、奴隷が主人の手を撫で、わずかな食べ物を求める姿は、私は美しくないと思う」
languages.original_text: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

traits.locale_text: 「自分の身体を気遣ってくれたエランタに感謝に来たモンケィは誠実だった。しかし、奴隷が主人の手を撫で、わずかな食べ物を求める姿は、私は美しくないと思う。」

languages.text: « Les mon-keigh étaient sincères lorsqu'ils sont venus remercier l'elantach de s'être {mf|préoccupé|préoccupée} de leur état physique. Cela dit, un esclave qui caresse la main de son maître pour un morceau de pain n'est pas quelque chose que je qualifierais de beau. »
languages.original_text: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

traits.locale_text: « Les mon-keigh étaient sincères lorsqu'ils sont venus remercier l'elantach de s'être {mf|préoccupé|préoccupée} de leur état physique. Cela dit, un esclave qui caresse la main de son maître pour un morceau de pain n'est pas quelque chose que je qualifierais de beau. »

languages.text: "Die Chem-Pan-Sey, die gekommen sind, um {mf|dem Elantach|der Elantach} zu danken, waren aufrichtig. Allerdings würde ich einen Sklaven, der die Hand seines Meisters tätschelt, um an Essensreste zu gelangen, nicht als 'schön' bezeichnen."
languages.original_text: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

traits.locale_text: "Die Chem-Pan-Sey, die gekommen sind, um {mf|dem Elantach|der Elantach} zu danken, waren aufrichtig. Allerdings würde ich einen Sklaven, der die Hand seines Meisters tätschelt, um an Essensreste zu gelangen, nicht als 'schön' bezeichnen."

languages.text: "Elantach'a bedenlerine gösterdiği ilgi için teşekkür etmeye gelen mon-keighler samimiydi. Ancak bir kölenin bir lokma yemek için efendisinin elini okşaması, benim güzel sayacağım bir şey değil."
languages.original_text: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

traits.locale_text: "Elantach'a bedenlerine gösterdiği ilgi için teşekkür etmeye gelen mon-keighler samimiydi. Ancak bir kölenin bir lokma yemek için efendisinin elini okşaması, benim güzel sayacağım bir şey değil."

languages.text: «Los mon-keigh que acudieron para dar gracias {mf|al|a la} elantach por sus cuidados se mostraron sinceros. Pero yo no veo belleza en que un esclavo acaricie la mano de su amo para mendigarle un poco de comida».
languages.original_text: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

traits.locale_text: «Los mon-keigh que acudieron para dar gracias {mf|al|a la} elantach por sus cuidados se mostraron sinceros. Pero yo no veo belleza en que un esclavo acaricie la mano de su amo para mendigarle un poco de comida».

languages.text: “那些因外界人关心他们的身躯而前来致谢的猴子，态度倒的确诚恳。但奴隶们为了区区一口食物，竟温顺地抚摸主人的手——这景象，可谈不上美丽。”
languages.original_text: "The mon-keigh that came to thank the elantach for showing concern for their bodies were sincere. But a slave caressing their master's hand for a morsel of food is not something I would deem beautiful."

traits.locale_text: “那些因外界人关心他们的身躯而前来致谢的猴子，态度倒的确诚恳。但奴隶们为了区区一口食物，竟温顺地抚摸主人的手——这景象，可谈不上美丽。”
